results.title: Royals rely on defense to defeat the Giants in the elimination phase
results.description: LA VEGA. The Reales de La Vega scored an epic 75-73 victory over the Gigantes Basketball Club in a Super Liga LNB elimination phase game held this Wednesday at the Fernando Teruel Sports Palace. With the victory, the Royals brought their record to 9-9, while the Giants stand at 13-5. results.title: Philippines set to celebrate a champion when NBA Finals are over
results.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — No matter what, the basketball-crazed Philippines will have a champion to celebrate when these NBA Finals are over. New York’s Jordan Clarkson and San Antonio’s Dylan Harper were both born in the U.S., but both have links to the Philippines through their mothers. And Clarkson raved about Harper, whose rookie year
